title: Cuneiform Tablet #0172: Hellenistic Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
